aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data, minimal authority signals, and poor AI visibility.
quick_wins: Create and optimize a Google Business Profile.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and local search.
critical_issues: Missing GBP photos, posts, and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and AI-driven recommendations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to improve AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and media features to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for ChatGPT and Google AI.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not found, and there is no schema markup to aid AI in citing their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and authority building to make their business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Constant Heating & Air
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI-driven platforms.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and drive more leads.
